name: Wood Block Brain Puzzle
description: Wood Block Brain Puzzle Looking for a fun and addictive puzzle game that will keep you entertained for hours on end? Look no further than Wood Block Brain Games, the ultimate wood block game for you! With its simple and intuitive gameplay, Wood Block is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages and skill levels. Simply drag and drop the wooden blocks to fill up the board and complete each level. With increasing levels of difficulty, youll never run out of challenges to tackle! Join millions of players who love Block Puzzle Wood Blast, the addictive puzzle game that sharpens your mind and relieves stress. Play anytime.
instructions: Mouse Operated - Press amp Hold left mouse button to pick and place blocks
